notes: Single self-contained HTML, no libraries. DPR-aware full-page canvas with horizon scaled to viewport. Layered parallax via modulo scroll: stars/sun, drifting clouds, far mountains (seeded jagged peaks), near hills, mid tree band, asphalt road with moving center dashes, near lamp poles + signs, and fastest foreground grass tufts. Hand-drawn side-view car with rolling-without-slipping wheel spin tied to scroll, spokes, hubcaps, sunset body gradient, window reflections, head/tail lights, plus subtle body bob and pitch. Cinematic sunset gradient sky and radial vignette.
